snippet.title: Miley Cyrus - Angels Like You (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Miley’s New Album Plastic Hearts is Available Now: https://mileyl.ink/PlasticHearts
 
View merch at Miley’s official store now! https://smarturl.it/MileyStore?iQid=yt  

Follow Miley on Spotify, Apple Music or Deezer to get new music as soon as it’s out: https://smarturl.it/FollowMC?iQid=yt 

Connect with Miley
Facebook: https://mileyl.ink/facebook 
Twitter: https://mileyl.ink/twitter 
Instagram: https://mileyl.ink/instagram 
Snapchat: https://mileyl.ink/snapchat 
Tiktok: https://mileyl.ink/tiktok 
Site: http://www.mileycyrus.com

LYRICS
Flowers in hand, waiting for me 
Every word in poetry 
Won’t call me by name, only baby 
The more that you give the less that I 
Need everyone says I look happy 
When it feels right

I know that you’re wrong for me
Gonna wish we never met on the day I leave
I brought you down to your knees 
‘Cause they say that misery loves company 
It's not your fault I ruin everything
And it’s not you’re fault I can’t be what you need
Baby 
Angels like you can’t fly down here with me 
I’m everything they said I would be

(La La la)
I’m everything they said I would be

I’ll put you down slow
Love you goodbye 
before you let go, just one more time
Take off you’re clothes
pretend that it’s fine
A little more hurt won’t kill you 
tonight mama says you don’t look happy 
Close your eyes 

I know that you’re wrong for me
Gonna wish we never met on the day I leave
I brought you down to your knees 
‘Cause they say that misery loves company 
It's not your fault I ruin everything
And it’s not you’re fault I can’t be what you need
Baby 
Angels like you can’t fly down here with me 
I’m everything they said I would be

I know that you’re wrong for me
Gonna wish we never met on the day I leave
I brought you down to your knees 
‘Cause they say that misery loves company 
It's not your fault I ruin everything
And it’s not you’re fault I can’t be what you need
Baby 
Angels like you can’t fly down here with me 
I’m everything they said I would be

CREDITS:
Directed By Alana O’Herlihy & Miley Cyrus
DOP: Kevin Hayden
Editor: Alana O’Herlihy
Graphics and Logos by: Emmanuel O’Brien & Eamonn Freel
On-set Production: Eva Evans; Camera Operator: Yuya Kudo;
Post Production: Louise Mérat at Streeters

snippet.description:
Citroën C6 bol na svoju dobu odvážne auto. Originálne, svojské a plné technológií. A preto je na mieste otázka, prečo nakoniec zlyhal? https://www.volant.tv/preco-zlyhal-citroen-c6/
Partner videa Superúvery.sk: https://www.superuvery.sk/produkty/uver-na-automobil-a-motocykel/
Fotografie a technické údaje na volant.tv: https://www.volant.tv/preco-zlyhal-citroen-c6/

snippet.title: ROSÉ - 'On The Ground' M/V
snippet.description:
On The Ground

My life's been magic seems fantastic
I used to have a hole in the wall with a mattress
It’s funny when you want it
Suddenly you have it
You find out that your gold’s just plastic

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down

I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

My world’s been hectic seems electric
But I’ve been waking up with your voice in my head
And I’m trying to send a message
And let you know that every single minute I’m without you I regret it

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down
I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

I’m way up in the clouds
And they say I’ve made it now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the ground

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and Harry’s Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines won’t be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs 
44:03 The Moment: From Prairies to Bollywood

Subscribe to The National: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/CBCTheNational?sub_confirmation=1

Connect with The National online:
Facebook | https://www.facebook.com/thenational
Twitter | https://twitter.com/CBCTheNational
Instagram | https://www.instagram.com/cbcthenational

More from CBC News | https://www.cbc.ca/news

The National is CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism, with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang in Toronto, Ian Hanomansing in Vancouver and the CBC's chief political correspondent, Rosemary Barton in Ottawa.

snippet.title: TOTO JE NAJ AUTO DO 20 000 € - nie muzika, ale koncert za vaše peniaze! @volant.tv
snippet.description:
Na otázku, ktoré je najlepšie auto na svete, existuje rovnaká odpoveď ako na otázku, ktoré dievča je na svete najkrajšie. Jedným slovom - neexistuje. Nie je nič také ako najlepšie auto na svete, rovnako ako najkrajšie dievča sveta. No keď do rovnice vložíme jeden parameter (v tomto prípade limit ceny), môže existovať reálny výsledok. Ten náš spoznáte v tomto videu. Aj tu, samozrejme platí, že to nie je najlepšie auto pre všetkých, s tou úvahou video pre istotu rovno začína. Pre nás a doposiaľ všetkých opýtaných je však to naj auto do 20 000 € práve toto. Ak sa k niektorým autám dá použiť prirovnanie veľa muziky za málo peňazí, v tomto prípade to je za vaše peniaze doslova koncert.

SÚŤAŽ KÚP TRIČKO - VYHRAJ AUTO - pravidlá:

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, March 3, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 10 (SN10) – our third high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from SpaceX’s site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee – approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship’s attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN10’s Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX’s third high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.title: 10 MIN BEST OF HIIT - a compilation of the best parts of my HIIT workouts - INTENSE I Pamela Reif
snippet.description:
SUCH A KILLER ROUTINE - but you won't notice while you're training (because it's also kind of happy). I was dripping sweat after only 1 round! ♥︎ Cardio is fun today! / Werbung

omg I am so exciteeeeeed! 
A combination of your (and my :D) favorite parts of the 15min Happy Dance, 12min Happy Sweat, 12min Happy Cardio & 10min R&B Dance. Basically, it's mostly about the last, super high energy songs! The parts that we put all our energy into, that we sweat it all out & feel so happy afterwards. 

This is my favorite HIIT workout ever now. It's SUPER DUPER intense, will kick your ass, but it will also kick the 12min Happy Cardio from it's throne haha. At least for my personal taste. Let me know what you think!!! 

▸ burn lots of calories 
▸ improve your endurance 
▸ main muscles worked: thighs, butt, abs (from all the high knees)
▸ boost your mood & just be happyyyyy

PS: thanks for helping me decide about the workout parts on Insta Stories! Always love to do whatever you like best :))

__

Apart form the good mood & I can also guarantee a serious number of burned calories here. 

▸ I burned 90kcal in those 10min (which is a loooooot). 
Depending on your height, weight and fitness level this might vary between 80-160kcal. 

__

▸ you can find FREE WORKOUT PLANS on my Instagram Channel. 30min, 45min and Beginner Friendly combinations. Check out the Highlight Bubble "Workout Plans" for that.  

➞ Instagram http://www.instagram.com/pamela_rf/
use #PamelaReif if you want me to see your workout pics and videos! 

▸ my Pam App ♥︎ Free workout plans, recipes & tips: 
https://appurl.io/5Exh2D1Uo 

__
 
I update my workout playlist weekly & it's available on Spotify, Apple Music, etc. ♥︎
http://wmg.click/GetActive

1. David Guetta feat. Nicki Minaj, Bebe Rexha & Afrojack - Hey Mama  
2. Sam And The Womp - Bom Bom   
3. Parx feat. Nonô - Feel Right Now
4. Ciara - Level Up 

__

Business Contact:
pamela_reif@icloud.com

__
unterstützt durch Warner Music Germany

Disclaimer:
When joining me for this workout video, you need to take some precautions as your health and safety is the most important. To avoid any injury or harm, you need to check your health with your doctor before exercising. By performing any fitness exercises without supervision like with this video, you are performing them at your own risk. See a fitness professional to give you advice on your exercise form. Pamela Reif will not be responsible or liable for any injury or harm you sustain as a result of this video.

snippet.title: Hercai 62. Bölüm
snippet.description:
62. Bölüm Özeti 🦋

Dilşah, Reyyan’ın Miran’dan gizlediği gerçeği öğrenmiş, elindeki belgeyi Reyyan’a koz olarak kullanmaya başlamıştır. Fakat Reyyan ne olursa olsun kararından dönmeyecektir. Fakat Umut’a kendini unutturmayacak anlar bırakmak istemektedir.  Düşmanlık ve kin yüzünden bir en basit mutluluklardan bile eksik kaldıklarını fark eder. Doğru dürüst bir düğün resimleri bile yoktur oğullarına bırakacakları. Miran, sevdiği kadının aldığı bu önemli karardan bihaber, oğlu ve karısının içlerinde hiçbir şeyin uhde kalmaması için harekete geçer. Yarım kalan ne varsa tamamlayacaktır. En başta da düğün. Bu büyük sevdayı, bir düğünle taçlandıracaklardır. Onlar mutluluklarını tamamlayacak bir düğünün hazırlıkları için uğraşırken, Azat ve Gönül’de aşkları ve hayatları adına çok önemli bir karar alırlar.  Aldıkları bu karar, küllenmiş kinlerin yeniden alevlenmesine neden olacak, Reyyan ve Miran’ın barış ve huzur için inşa ettikleri yeni ortamı çatırdatmaya başlayacaktır.  

Ayrıcalıklardan yararlanmak için bu kanala katılın:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC2l92bN_FWHjZZPdOYnZveg/join

“İntikamdan doğan imkansız bir aşkın hikayesi”

Yapımcılığını, Mia Yapım Banu Akdeniz üstlendiği, "İntikamdan doğan imkansız bir aşkın hikayesi" mottosuyla yola çıkan Hercai'nin başrollerini Akın Akınözü, Ebru Şahin, Gülçin Santıroğlu, Serhat Tutumluer, Ayda Aksel, Macit Sonkan, Serdar Özer, Oya Unustası, Tansu Taşanlar ve  İlay Erkök paylaşıyor.

Hercai YouTube Kanalına Abone Olmak İçin; https://bit.ly/2vwmORD

atv Resmi YouTube Kanalına Abone Olmak İçin; https://goo.gl/dmrDLN

Hercai Web Sayfası; https://goo.gl/ziLDeQ

snippet.title: Ondrej Janíček: Jankovská sa nezosypala. Je to fraška
snippet.description:
Hosťom podcastu je Ondrej Janíček, trenčiansky podnikateľ, ktorému sa vyhrážala mafia a za fungovania bývalej štátnej tajomníčky Moniky Jankovskej sa nedočkal od súdov spravodlivosti. Čo si myslí o psychickom zrútení Jankovskej a prečo si myslí, že so to stalo? V tomto smere súhlasí s jej obhajcom. 
Ako vníma proces kolúznej väzby a čo si myslí o tom, že Jankovskú navštevoval jej syn, ktorý si zobral za ženu dcéru človeka s mafiánskym pozadím? Podľa Janíčkových slov je to celé len premyslená hra zo strany Jankovskej a myslí si, že ak sa dostane na slobodu, konca vyšetrovania sa nikdy nedočkáme. To všetko a oveľa viac sa dozvieš v Startitup Diskusnom Klube.

Moderuje Šimon Žďárský: https://www.instagram.com/simonzdarsky/

Diskusný klub vám prináša KROS Fakturácia. Nové online riešenie nielen pre podnikateľov: https://www.kros.sk

#OndrejJaníček #MonikaJankovská #StartitupDiskusnýKlub

👍 Vďaka za odber! 

💻 Čítaj náš web: https://www.startitup.sk
📱 Sleduj náš Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/startitup_sk
⌨️ A lajkuj Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/startitupcommunity

📩 Ak máš návrhy na spolupráce, prípadne tipy na videá: video@startitup.sk 

▶️ Startitup - Robíme to inak

snippet.title: What if the World turned to Gold? - The Gold Apocalypse
snippet.description:
The Map of Evolution and other sciency posters, researched and designed with love, are now available on the kurzgesagt shop. 
Your purchase will support us directly and keep our videos free for everyone. 
►► https://shop.kurzgesagt.org
(Worldwide Shipping Available)

Sources & further reading:
https://sites.google.com/view/sources-goldapocalypse/

Let us explore the scientific mystery of what would happen to you, if Earth suddenly turned into gold! The “Midaspocalypse”, based on the ancient tale of King Midas who was cursed so everything he touched turned into gold.

snippet.title: Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, opens up about her family
snippet.description:
For the first time Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, publicly discusses her father Thomas Markle and her half-sister's forthcoming tell-all book in this previously unaired clip from her and Prince Harry's sit-down with Oprah Winfrey. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

Subscribe to the "CBS This Morning" YouTube channel: https://bit.ly/3ceNNCX
Watch more "CBS This Morning": http://bit.ly/1T88yAR
Like "CBS This Morning" on Facebook: https://on.fb.me/1LhtdvI
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Instagram: https://bit.ly/1Q7NGnY
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Twitter: https://bit.ly/1Xj5W3p
Follow CBS News on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3bdNXek

Get the latest news and best in original reporting from CBS News delivered to your inbox. Sign up for newsletters: https://cbsn.ws/1RqHw7T

Get your news on the go! Download CBS News mobile apps for Android and iOS: https://cbsn.ws/1Xb1WC8

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream local news live, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites and originals anytime, anywhere with Paramount+. Sign up here: https://bit.ly/309gCe2

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.title: Bájka Bocian a Líška - Rozprávky Líšky a Vlka
snippet.description:
Dnes nám Vlk a Líška priniesli novú rozprávku o tom, aby sme nerobili druhým to, čo nechceme, aby íní robili nám. Je to bájka Bocian a líška. Rozpráva príbeh o líške figliarke, ktorá si robila žartíky zo zvieratiek v celom lese. Stále premýšľala, ako nachytať kamarátov. Dokonca si vystrelila aj zo známeho kúzelníka bociana Floriána. Ale ten to figiarke vrátil a vymyslel na ňu svoj žartík. Aký? Viac vám rozpovie už bájka.

Ak nás máte radi a chceli by ste našu tvorbu posunúť ďalej, podporte nás na Patreone. Dozviete sa tam aj napríklad ako robil bocian Florián svoje kúzla : https://www.patreon.com/user?u=48291487

Ak sa vám páčia naše rozprávky a pesničky pre deti, prihláste sa na odber nášho kanálu BimBamKuku: https://www.youtube.com/c/BimBamKuku?sub_confirmation=1

Naše detské pesničky môžete počúvať tu: https://backl.ink/143673363

Sledujte nás aj na FB: https://www.facebook.com/bimbamkuku/ 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/bimbamkuku/

Naše CD a DVD si môžete objednávať tu: https://www.spinaker.sk/bimbamkuku

snippet.title: TOP 4 LIDÉ Z BUDOUCNOSTI, KTEŘÍ NÁS PŘIŠLI VAROVAT
snippet.description:
TOP 4 LIDÉ Z BUDOUCNOSTI, KTEŘÍ NÁS PŘIŠLI VAROVAT
V jednom mém starším videu jsme se zaměřili na lidi, kteří se svým vzhledem nápadně podobají lidem dávno zemřelým, což v nás mohlo vzbudit pocit, že tito lidé cestují časem. V dnešním videu se posuneme trochu dál a ukážeme si výpovědi 4 záhadných mužů, kteří o sobě tvrdí, že nás přišli z budoucnosti varovat před určitými hrozbami.

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover’s Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: SpaceX Starship Rocket Explodes After Landing
snippet.description: Mar.03 -- Space Exploration Technologies Corp.’s newest and biggest rocket pulled off its first successful landing, then exploded a brief time later and was engulfed by fire. The rocket flew to an altitude of about 10 kilometers (around 6 miles) before turning its engines back on and settling on the landing pad with a slight lean. It then exploded.

snippet.title: Milan Lasica: Odstúpiť by mali tí, ktorí podvodné tituly dávali
snippet.description:
Hosťom rozhovoru je legenda hereckého, režisérskeho i humoristického sveta, Milan Lasica. Velikán svojej doby aj súčasnosti svojimi trefnými hláškami a nenapodobiteľným pohľadom na svet stále baví divákov. Milan Lasica hovorí, že práve počas pandémie potrebujeme humor ako soľ. Hovorí, že sranda sa dá robiť zo všetkého, aj z vakcíny – najprv sa ale treba nechať zaočkovať.
Ako Milan Lasica vníma ruskú vakcínu Sputnik? Svoju mladosť prežil počas komunistického režimu a mal s ním pletky kvôli rozličným názorom a videniu sveta. Vraví, že aj napriek úspešným vakcináciám s ruskými vakcínami v minulých desaťročiach má k Sputniku prirodzenú nedôveru a počkal by, čo povie Európska únia.
Ako vidí obľúbený scenárista a zabávač zvládanie pandémie touto vládou? Čo hovorí na rastúcu nervozitu národa a celospoločenskú skepsu? Dá sa z toho dostať von? To všetko a oveľa viac sa dozvieš v Startitup Diskusnom Klube.

Moderuje Šimon Žďárský: https://www.instagram.com/simonzdarsky/

👍 Vďaka za odber!

snippet.title: Jana Bittó Cigániková - Ak má odstúpiť minister Sulík, musí tak spraviť aj premiér Matovič
snippet.description:
Minister Krajčí je bezmocný. Nevie presvedčiť vládu, aby sprísnila opatrenia. Stále však platí aj jeho vyjadrenie, že za seba nevidí lepšiu náhradu. V nemocniciach máme tisícky pacientov a denne umierajú stovky ľudí. Celú situáciu komplikuje chaos s prihlasovaním sa na očkovanie.

Ustojí to minister zdravotníctva? Ako pokračuje vládna kríza? Braňo Závodský sa rozprával s Janou Bittó Cigánikovou a Richardom Rašim.

PODCAST: https://www.expres.sk/podcasty/ 
Web: http://www.expres.sk/

snippet.title: Andrej Danko: Ak Sputnik položí Matoviča, dám si ho pichnúť
snippet.description:
S Andejom Dankom, bývalým predsedom parlamentu sme preberali dovoz Vakcíny Spunik V a jeho úlohu v ňom.
Hovorili sme sa o tom, prečo Rusko nepodalo žiadosť o registráciu liekovou agentúrou a či to môže súvisieť s jeho geopolitickými hrami. Danko zdôraznil jeho prínos pre obchod medzi Ruskom a Slovenskom, no len čas ukáže či to pomohlo. To všetko a oveľa viac sa dozvieš v Startitup Diskusnom Klube. 

Moderuje Šimon Žďárský: https://www.instagram.com/simonzdarsky/

Instagram Andreja Danka: https://www.instagram.com/andrej_danko_official/

#AndrejDanko #politika #vakcínaSputnik

snippet.title: An Afternoon with Prince Harry & James Corden
snippet.description:
Now that the Duke and Duchess of Sussex are settled into Southern California, James Corden thought it was time to show his friend Prince Harry the sights. From tea on an open top bus to visiting the "Fresh Prince of Bel Air" mansion, Prince Harry gets the tour he never dreamed of. Special thanks to Spartan for providing an incredible Spartan Race Obstacle Course to run. Learn more: spartan.com

Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: 6 MIN EVERYDAY STRETCH - for stiff muscles, flexibility & after your workout I Pamela Reif
snippet.description:
a quick routine for every day ♥︎ it works perfectly as a cool down after ANY kind of workout! But of course, you can also do this in an office break, simply to relax, before bed or in the morning / Werbung 

We stretch our entire body! 6min = 12 exercises. Short but beneficial :)
- legs, hips & butt
- tummy 
- back & chest 
- spine 

I learned to love stretching sooooo much! I remember, about 6 months ago I definitely didn't stretch enough. This also impacted by training, since my muscles were feeling stiff and sore for longer, I started getting pain in my knees, etc. 
Now, I really look forward to a short stretch after a session. It's so relaxing, the music calms me down and you will quickly see improvements :)

Let's calm down & give our bodies some love in a different kind of way. 

__

▸ you can find FREE WORKOUT PLANS on my Instagram Channel. 30min, 45min, Beginner Friendly combinations & a DANCE plan. Check out the Highlight Bubble "Workout Plans" for that.  

➞ Instagram http://www.instagram.com/pamela_rf/
use #PamelaReif if you want me to see your workout pics and videos! 

▸ my Pam App ♥︎ Free workout plans, recipes & tips: 
https://appurl.io/5Exh2D1Uo 

__

▸ You can always find ALL SONGS in my workout playlist. I update it weekly & it's available on Spotify, Apple Music, etc. ♥︎
http://wmg.click/GetActive

1. Charlotte Cardin – Daddy 0:00 - 2:46
2. Faouzia & John Legend - Minefields 2:47 - 5:43
3. Birdy - Loneliness 5:44 - 7:43

__ 

Business Contact:
pamela_reif@icloud.com

__
Disclaimer:
When joining me for this workout video, you need to take some precautions as your health and safety is the most important. To avoid any injury or harm, you need to check your health with your doctor before exercising. By performing any fitness exercises without supervision like with this video, you are performing them at your own risk. See a fitness professional to give you advice on your exercise form. Pamela Reif will not be responsible or liable for any injury or harm you sustain as a result of this video.

snippet.title: LOLLYMÁNIE - Potkaly jsme ufona v Brně😂
snippet.description:
Písnička stará 5 let, patří mezi vaše nejoblíbenější a tancovat na ní umí skoro každý z vás😍🎵 Jak je možné, že jsme na ní doteď nenatočily videoklip?🙄 To nevíme, ale vyjely jsme si na výlet do planetária a hvězdárny v Brně, abychom to napravily...a nakonec jsme i ufona potkaly😂😁


Odkazy na naše oficiální sociální sítě:
Facebook: www.facebook.com/LollipopzOfficial 
Instagram: www.instagram.com/LollipopzOfficial 

Vstupenky na na naše koncerty si můžete koupit v síti Ticketportal. Všechny akce, které se kvůli vládním opatřením neuskuteční budou přesunuté na nový termín: 
https://www.ticketportal.cz/event/LOLLIPOPZ-Velka-show

snippet.title: Rico x Miss Mood - 12 hónap (ft. T.Danny) (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
© 2021 Gold Soul Records
Fellépésszervezés: ericeo90@gmail.com
Rico Instagram (http://bit.ly/2eGaOi8​)
Miss Mood Instagram (http://bit.ly/2fKtbVC​)
GOLD SOUL WEBSHOP: http://www.goldsoul.hu​
Rico Facebook (https://bit.ly/2GUwB3J​)
Miss Mood Facebook (http://bit.ly/2vpb68P​)
T.Danny Instagram (https://bit.ly/2PbpjCA)
T.Danny Facebook (https://bit.ly/3pU21xN) 

DIGITÁLIS STORE-okban: https://backl.ink/144950646
(iTunes, Apple Music, Deezer, Spotify, Google Play, Amazon) 

Rico x Miss Mood - 12 hónap (ft. T.Danny) (Official Music Video)
Lyrics, Rap, Vocal by Rico, Miss Mood, T.Danny
Produced, Mix & Master by SMiTHMUSiX (https://bit.ly/2xgxUdH​)
Recorded @ Kinx Studio (2021) (http://bit.ly/2w1tvKq​)
Írta és rendezte: Vaszil Erik, Mező Dorottya  
Kamera: LehoDanel, Horváth Csaba
Vágás, VFX: LeHoDaNel (@leholegacy), Horváth Csaba 
Fényelés: Horváth Csaba (https://bit.ly/2IR4QiB​)
Smink: Miss Mood MakeUp (http://bit.ly/2vLIUy1​)

Rico

Nagy levegő beszív és a szív újra kitár
Nem véletlenül sírdogál alattam a gitár
Nem vagyok jól, talán mert a lelkem nem meditál
Bár azt mondják, hogy ami nem megy azt erőltetni kár
De mostanában semmi motivációm csak játszom
Filmezek és agyalok, hogy mit keresek láncon
Elvették egy évemet és eggyel több a ráncom
A te szemedben sikeresnek látszom?
Túl magas a jéghegy és egy emberiség mássza
De meddig tarthat ennek az időszaknak a gyásza
Van e még a jövőnknek a pakliban egy ásza
Ami ezt a jelent végleg levadássza

Rico (Pre Hook)

Túl hosszú ez a 12 hónap
Reménykedem már, hogy bekopog a holnap
És hogy hamarosan ez a jég elolvad
De remélem te jól vagy... (Jól vagy?)

Miss Mood (Refrén)

Holnap, holnap, holnap, holnap
Ohh, gyere már
Hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy
Vár a világ
Holnap, holnap, holnap, holnap
Ohh, gyere már
Hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy
Hol vagy már?

T.Danny 

Túl sok, túl sok, túl sok, túl sok...
Volt ez az év
Zúzok, zúzok, zúzok, zúzok...
Elvisz a hév
Eltelt 12 hónap
Nem megyek sehova akkor se ha szólnak
Hogyha kérdezik hogy vagyok, mit mondjak
Egyre kevésbé tartom magamat jónak
Folyton itthon vagyok, de üres a kecó
Ülök a szobában nem csörög a teló
Épp messze járok nem köt le a meló
Be is vagyok zárva, ez így nem jó

Rico (Pre Hook)

Túl hosszú ez a 12 hónap
Reménykedem már, hogy bekopog a holnap
És hogy hamarosan ez a jég elolvad
De remélem te jól vagy... (Jól vagy?)

Miss Mood (Refrén)

Holnap, holnap, holnap, holnap
Ohh, gyere már
Hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy
Vár a világ
Holnap, holnap, holnap, holnap
Ohh, gyere már
Hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy
Hol vagy már?

Miss Mood (Bridge)

Mondd mikor lett jégből a világ
Miért nem jöhet fény az ablakon át
Ohh, látod e a remény sugarát
Én itt leszek és várok még rá

Miss Mood (Refrén)

Holnap, holnap, holnap, holnap
Ohh, gyere már
Hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy
Vár a világ
Holnap, holnap, holnap, holnap
Ohh, gyere már
Hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy, hol vagy
Hol vagy már?

snippet.title: See Mars Like Never Before! NASA's Perseverance Rover Sends New Video and Images of the Red Planet
snippet.description: NASA’s Perseverance Mars Rover safely touched down on the Red Planet on Feb. 18. So what will the robotic scientist "see" on her descent and what will she do next? Join mission experts for update about the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – including imagery it captured and its mission to explore Mars.

snippet.title: Jan Bendig - S TEBOU (Official video)
snippet.description:
Komentujte, lajkujte a hlavně SDÍLEJTE :)
BOOKING J. Bendig: +420 737 480 001
IG: https://www.instagram.com/bendigjan/

MERCH OBJEDNÁVEJTE ZDE: https://shop.rukahore.sk/jan-bendig

Děkujeme Tuniskému národnímu úřadu pro cestovní ruch a cestovní kanceláři EXIM TOURS za to, že toto natáčení bylo vůbec umožněno. Tento song a klip věnujeme všem obyvatelům Tuniska, děkujeme za nádherné natáčecí dny u vás...

Je přísný zákaz jakéhokoliv stahování tohoto videoklipu a jeho nahrávání na vaše či cizí sociální sítě. Každé porušení bude hlášeno na Policii ČR jako porušení našich autorských práv. 

SLOŽIL: Jan Bendig
TEXT: Refew, Barbora Bagárová, Jan Bendig
HUDBA: Jiří Vidasov
KYTARA: Milan Kroka
PRODUCENT: Lukáš Rejmon

REŽIE A SCÉNÁŘ: Lukáš Rejmon
KAMERA: Jan Strach, Nikita Rublev
STŘIH: NATT CALI

snippet.title: Hercai 60. Bölüm
snippet.description:
60. Bölüm Özeti 🦋
Reyyan ve Miran’ın birbirlerine olan kırgınlıkları sona ermiş, aşkları her zamankinden de kuvvetli devam etmektedir. Öyle ki Miran, Reyyan’ın isteğiyle Azize’ye bir şans vermeye karar verir. Ancak ondan bir isteği olacaktır. Öte yandan çiftlikte duyulan silah sesi Hazar ve Nasuh’un çiftlik evine koşmalarına neden olur. Karşısında gördüğü manzara Hazar’ı şoke edecektir. Yaren’in verdiği haber onu öldürmeye kararlı olan Füsun’u durdurur. Dilşah, Azra’yı kaybetme korkusuyla yanlış adımlar atmaktadır. Bu sırada Reyyan ve Miran’ın hayatında ise tüm olup bitenlerden daha önemli bir durum meydana gelir. Füsun ve Dilşah hesaplaşmasında neler olacak? Azize Miran’ın şartını kabul edecek mi? 


Ayrıcalıklardan yararlanmak için bu kanala katılın:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC2l92bN_FWHjZZPdOYnZveg/join

“İntikamdan doğan imkansız bir aşkın hikayesi”

Yapımcılığını, Mia Yapım Banu Akdeniz üstlendiği, "İntikamdan doğan imkansız bir aşkın hikayesi" mottosuyla yola çıkan Hercai'nin başrollerini Akın Akınözü, Ebru Şahin, Gülçin Santıroğlu, Serhat Tutumluer, Ayda Aksel, Macit Sonkan, Serdar Özer, Oya Unustası, Tansu Taşanlar ve  İlay Erkök paylaşıyor.

Hercai YouTube Kanalına Abone Olmak İçin; https://bit.ly/2vwmORD

atv Resmi YouTube Kanalına Abone Olmak İçin; https://goo.gl/dmrDLN

Hercai Web Sayfası; https://goo.gl/ziLDeQ

Yaren’in verdiği haber onu öldürmeye kararlı olan Füsun’u durdurur. Dilşah, Azra’yı kaybetme korkusuyla yanlış adımlar atmaktadır. Bu sırada Reyyan ve Miran’ın hayatında ise tüm olup bitenlerden daha önemli bir durum meydana gelir. Füsun ve Dilşah hesaplaşmasında neler olacak? Azize Miran’ın şartını kabul edecek mi? 


Ayrıcalıklardan yararlanmak için bu kanala katılın:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC2l92bN_FWHjZZPdOYnZveg/join

“İntikamdan doğan imkansız bir aşkın hikayesi”

Yapımcılığını, Mia Yapım Banu Akdeniz üstlendiği, "İntikamdan doğan imkansız bir aşkın hikayesi" mottosuyla yola çıkan Hercai'nin başrollerini Akın Akınözü, Ebru Şahin, Gülçin Santıroğlu, Serhat Tutumluer, Ayda Aksel, Macit Sonkan, Serdar Özer, Oya Unustası, Tansu Taşanlar ve  İlay Erkök paylaşıyor.

Hercai YouTube Kanalına Abone Olmak İçin; https://bit.ly/2vwmORD

atv Resmi YouTube Kanalına Abone Olmak İçin; https://goo.gl/dmrDLN

Hercai Web Sayfası; https://goo.gl/ziLDeQ

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman’s (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT
Like HBO Max on Facebook: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxFacebook

snippet.title: Tuukka Rask accidentally leaves net in tie game
snippet.description: Boston Bruins goalie Tuukka Rask skates off late in the 3rd period for an extra attacker, forgetting the game is tied and has to scramble back to the net. Rask would get the last laugh, with his Bruins defeating the New York Rangers, 3-2 in overtime

snippet.title: Mars Rover Landing Overview- NOW SAFE ON MARS!!!
snippet.description:
This will be cooler than the Super Bowl. Thanks to Bill and Melinda Gates for partnering with me on this video. Read the 2021 Annual Letter, here: http://gatesnot.es/3cfnMF6

Watch the live stream- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gm0b_ijaYMQ&ab_channel=NASA
Main rover landing page- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/
Cool rover interactive animation of the 7 mins of terror- https://eyes.nasa.gov/apps/mars2020/#/home?id=surface_operations&time=2021-02-18T12:44:05.006-08:00&rate=0
Spin the rover around in 3D- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/rover/

Here is the video about why we should explore space even with problems here on Earth- https://youtu.be/lARpY0nIQx0

(Post-rock, four-member band from Texas.)

Lyrics:
I’m on an island
Even when you’re close
Can’t take the silence
I’d rather be alone
I think it’s pretty plain and simple
We gave it all we could
It’s time I wave goodbye from the window
Let’s end this like we should and say we’re good

We’re not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let’s at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you’re with somebody else
As long as you swear you won’t be pissed when I do it myself 
Let’s end it like we should and say we’re good

No need to hide it 
Go get what you want
This won’t be a burden if we both don’t hold a grudge
I think it’s pretty plain and simple
We gave it all we could
It’s time I wave goodbye from the window
Let’s end this like we should and say we’re good

We’re not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let’s at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you’re with somebody else
As long as you swear you won’t be pissed when I do it myself 
Let’s end it like we should and say we’re good

Now you’re holding this against me
Like I knew you would
I tried my best to make this easy
So don’t give me that look just say we’re good

We’re not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let’s at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you’re with somebody else
As long as you swear you won’t be pissed when I do it myself 
Let’s end it like we should and say we’re good

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'. 

#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #MoonlightEdition

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32’ to tie at one and added two more in the 65’ and 85’. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70’ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27’ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
We’ve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and here’s what we created. Aren’t 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, let’s try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts you’ll adore. 

Timestamps: 

1:06 — How to fix a broken wood piece 

2:25 — DIY ring 

2:48 — Beautiful, DIY jewelry holder 

4:15 — DIY hair comb 

6:53 — Cute DIY earrings

localized.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
localized.description:
We’ve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and here’s what we created. Aren’t 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, let’s try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts you’ll adore.

snippet.title: Raego - Moje Ex (OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO)
snippet.description:
Děkuju, že sdílíte náš song! Díky, že lajkujete! ) Bude to tento rok, 10 let, co jsme spolu na YOUTUBE začali revoluci, kdy jste vy moji fanoušci natrvalo překreslili hudební trh a vykřičeli jste si svojí podporu pro mě. Stal se zázrak. Já bez rozpočtu, bez podpory médií jsem zasáhl Českou republiku, kdy každý měsíc mluvím k půl milionu unikátních lidí. Je to neuvěřitelný! Jenom díky Vám, jsem dneska, kde jsem. Chci se vám otevřít, abyste znali nejen moje úspěchy, ale i to, co mi pomohlo stát se tím, kým dnes jsem. Cítím, že je lepší ukázat i svá slabá místa, aby jste pochopili, že jsem vlastně jeden z Vás. Člověk z masa a kostí. Mám obrovskou radost, kam to spolu dotahujeme a právě díky Vám společně rosteme! Obrovskou práci na tracku odvedl Jayko, který je skvělý producent, ale i výjimečný člověk. Adam, který se zhostil režie, ukázal, že se v něm skrývá obří talent. Poděkování všem partnerům jako Advantage cars, Jakubovi a Nikče Ponerovým, Tomáši a Petře Řehořkovým, Art Deco Hotel Imperial nebo Honzovi z FILM Legends MUSEUM jsem vypsal ještě dole. Najdete je na jejich sociálních sítích pod jejich jmény. Mimochodem jsme do klipu vzali tři fanoušky z tik toku, kteří písničku propagovali jen tak. Věřím, že fanoušků je potřeba si vážít a proto, že Vám chci být blíž, vzal jsem jich rovnou čtyři a ukázal jim trošku ze svého života i v zákulisí - víc najdete na instagramu, kde pravidelně komunikuji. Děláte mi velkou radost, že nás takhle sdílíte. Jste super! 

Užijte si tenhle song naplno i na spotify.
https://open.spotify.com/album/1njhM961KvBhrYjo1hASbu

🌏 WEB: https://www.raego.cz​ 
👕 MERCH: https://www.raegoshop.cz/​ 
🎵SPOTIFY: https://open.spotify.com/artist/69d4g​...
🌴 INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/raegoreal/?​...
🆒FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/RaegoTV/​
🕑 BUSINESS CONTACT: RAEGOTV@GMAIL.COM

Poděkování: 
ADVANTAGE CARS - FERRARI
OUTFIT RAEGO:  Jakub a Nikola Ponerovi - PONER 
Tomáš a Petra z Petra Clinic
Honza s rodinou z FILM LEGENDS MUSEUM PRAGUE 
Poděkování Blance z Art Deco Hotel Imperial 
Chládek Boxing Academy

Herečka: Týna Smetanová z Opatow Dance School 
Herečky: Kateřina Nemethova + tatínek, Aneta Horká, Nela Arnoldová, Aneta Arnoldová

snippet.title: 10 MIN LOVE DANCE WORKOUT - burn calories to Oldies Love Songs / Pamela Reif I No Equipment
snippet.description:
♥︎ a little SEXY, a hint of DRAMA & some OLDIES DISCO VIBES!  / Anzeige 

Happy Valentine’s Day to everyone & THANK YOU SO MUCH for 6 million. I am super grateful for this unbelievably fit and motivated community. It’s my pleasure to be your online training friend & you can be sure: I’m always available for you ♥︎ The last year has been a crazy journey. But other than „thank you“ I also want to make sure that… you squeeze that booty (pronounced: BootAY) :D 

To celebrate this wonderful milestone, I created a Love Dance Workout for us. Surprise hihi :) 

▸ Oldies Songs, as a fun Throwback 
▸ fun, sexy, happy & a some disco steps
▸ dance moves are easy to medium 
▸ ... get ready to brighten up your mood! woop woop

Don't worry if you can't follow everything perfectly in the beginning. You'll get the hang out of it after doing it once or twice - I'm sure!! :) 

__

▸ you can find FREE WORKOUT PLANS on my Instagram Channel. 30min, 45min, Beginner Friendly combinations & a DANCE plan. Check out the Highlight Bubble "Workout Plans" for that.  

➞ Instagram http://www.instagram.com/pamela_rf/
use #PamelaReif if you want me to see your workout pics and videos! 

▸ my Pam App ♥︎ Free workout plans, recipes & tips: 
https://appurl.io/5Exh2D1Uo 


__
 
▸ I update my workout playlist weekly & it's available on Spotify, Apple Music, etc. ♥︎
http://wmg.click/GetActive

1. Aretha Franklin - (You Make Me Feel Like) A Natural Woman 0:00 - 2:14
2. George Benson - Give Me The Night 2:15 - 4:23
3. Hot Chocolate - You Sexy Thing 4:24 - 6:42
4. Kylie Minogue - Can't Get You Out Of My Head 6:43 - 10:32

__

Business Contact:
pamela_reif@icloud.com

__
unterstützt durch Warner Music Germany

Disclaimer:
When joining me for this workout video, you need to take some precautions as your health and safety is the most important. To avoid any injury or harm, you need to check your health with your doctor before exercising. By performing any fitness exercises without supervision like with this video, you are performing them at your own risk. See a fitness professional to give you advice on your exercise form. Pamela Reif will not be responsible or liable for any injury or harm you sustain as a result of this video.
